e=e||0,Math.round((e>360?e-360:e)*6e4)}function Gc(e){const t=e.toString(16);return t.length===1?"0"+t:t}function Xc(e,t,r){return(Gc(e)+Gc(t)+Gc(r)).toUpperCase()}function Ge(e,t){let is not a valid scheme color or hex RGB! "${or}" used instead. Only provide 6-digit RGB or 'pptx.SchemeColor' values!`),r=or);const n=Mc.test(r)?"srgbClr":"schemeClr",a='val="'+(Mc.test(r)?r.toUpperCase():r)+'"';return t?`<a:${n} ${a}>${t}</a:${n}>`:`<a:${n} ${a}/>`}function Ux(e,t){let r="";const n=Object.assign(Object.assign({},t),e),a=Math.round(n.size*Jo),o=n.color,i=Math.round(n.opacity*1e5);return r+=`<a:glow rad="${a}">`,r+=Ge(o,`<a:alpha val="${i}"/>`),r+="</a:glow>",r}function Ar(e){let t="solid",r="",n="",a="";return e&&(typeof e=="string"?r=e:(e.type&&(t=e.type),e.color&&(r=e.color),e.alpha&&(n+=`<a:alpha wn(e){return e._rels.length+e._relsChart.length+e._relsMedia.length+1}function jc(e){if(!(!e||typeof e!="object"))return e.type!=="outer"&&e.type!=="inner"&&e.type!=="none"&&(console.warn("Warning: shadow.type options are `outer`, `inner` or `none`."),e.type="outer"),e.angle&&((isNaN(Number(e.angle))||e.angle<0||e.angle>359)&&(console.warn("Warning: shadow.angle can only be 0-359"),e.angle=270),e.angle=Math.round(Number(e.angle))),e.opacity&&((isNaN(Number(e.opacity))||e.opacity<0||e.opacity>1)&&(console.warn("Warning: shadow.opacity can only be 0-1"),e.opacity=.75),e.opacity=Number(e.opacity)),e.color&&e.color.startsWith("#")&&(console.warn('Warning: shadow.color should not include hash (#) character, , e.g. Target="../embeddings/Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet${e.globalId}.xlsx"/></Relationships>`),t.file(`ppt/charts/${e.fileName}`,Kx(e)),n("")}).catch(c=>{a(c)})})})}function Kx(e){var t,r,n,a;let o='<?xml val="${n}"/>`,s+="</c:"+e+"Chart>";break;case ue.BUBBLE:case ue.BUBBLE3D:s+="<c:bubbleChart>",s+='<c:varyColors val="0"/>',i=-1,t.filter((c,d)=>d>0).forEach((c,d)=>{i++,s+="<c:ser>",s+=`  <c:idx sourceLinked="0"/>`,s+="<c:txPr><a:bodyPr/><a:lstStyle/><a:p><a:pPr>",s+=`<a:defRPr b="${r.dataLabelFontBold?1:0}" i="${r.dataLabelFontItalic?1:0}" strike="noStrike" sz="${Math.round(Math.round(r.dataLabelFontSize||_r)*100)}" u="none">`,s+=`<a:solidFill>${Ge(r.dataLabelColor||or)}</a:solidFill>`,s+=`<a:latin typeface="${r.dataLabelFontFace||"Arial"}"/>`,s+="</a:defRPr></a:pPr></a:p></c:txPr>",r.dataLabelPosition&&(s+=`<c:dLblPos val="${r.dataLabelPosition}"/>`),s+='<c:showLegendKey ue.PIE:u=t[0],s+="<c:"+e+"Chart>",s+='  <c:varyColors val="1"/>',s+="<c:ser>",s+='  <c:idx val="0"/>',s+='  <c:order val="0"/>',s+="  <c:tx>",s+="    <c:strRef>",s+="      <c:f>Sheet1!$B$1</c:f>",s+=" val="'+(r.showPercent?"1":"0")+'"/>',s+='    <c:showBubbleSize val="0"/>',s+="  </c:dLbl>"}),s+=` <c:numFmt formatCode="${De(r.dataLabelFormatCode)||"General"}" sourceLinked="0"/>`,s+=" i="${r.dataLabelFontItalic?"1":"0"}" u="none" strike="noStrike">`,s+='            <a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val="000000"/></a:solidFill><a:latin typeface="Arial"/>',s+="          </a:defRPr>",s+=" <c:showSerName val="0"/>',s+='    <c:showPercent val="1"/>',s+='    <c:showBubbleSize val="0"/>',s+=` <c:showLeaderLines val="${r.showLeaderLines?"1":"0"}"/>`,s+="</c:dLbls>",s+="<c:cat>",s+=" idx="${d}"><c:v>${De(c)}</c:v></c:pt>`}),s+="    </c:strCache>",s+="  </c:strRef>",s+="</c:cat>",s+="  <c:val>",s+="    <c:numRef>",s+=`      <c:f>Sheet1!$B$2:$B$${u.labels[0].length+1}</c:f>`,s+="      <c:numCache>",s+=`           <c:ptCount val="${u.labels[0].length}"/>`,u.values.forEach((c,d)=>{s+=`<c:pt idx="${d}"><c:v>${c||c===0?c:""}</c:v></c:pt>`}),s+="      </c:numCache>",s+="    </c:numRef>",s+="  </c:val>",s+="  </c:ser>",s+=`  <c:firstSliceAng val="${r.firstSliceAng?Math.round(r.firstSliceAng):0}"/>`,e===ue.DOUGHNUT&&(s+=`<c:holeSize val="${typeof r.holeSize=="number"?r.holeSize:"50"}"/>`),s+="</c:"+e+"Chart>";break;default:s+="";break}return s}function Yc(e,t,r){let n="";return e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D?n+="<c:valAx>":n+="<c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',n+="  <c:scaling>",n+='<c:orientation val="'+(e.catAxisOrientation||(e.barDir==="col","minMax"))+'"/>',(e.catAxisMaxVal||e.catAxisMaxVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:max val="${e.catAxisMaxVal}"/>`),(e.catAxisMinVal||e.catAxisMinVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:min val="${e.catAxisMinVal}"/>`),n+="</c:scaling>",n+='  <c:delete val="'+(e.catAxisHidden?"1":"0")+'"/>',n+='  <c:axPos val="'+(e.barDir==="col"?"b":"l")+'"/>',n+=e.catGridLine.style!=="none"?Jc(e.catGridLine):"",e.showCatAxisTitle&&(n+=Es({color:e.catAxisTitleColor,fontFace:e.catAxisTitleFontFace,fontSize:e.catAxisTitleFontSize,titleRotate:e.catAxisTitleRotate,title:e.catAxisTitle||"Axis Title"})),e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D?n+='  <c:numFmt formatCode="'+(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode?De(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode):"General")+'" sourceLinked="1"/>':n+='  <c:numFmt formatCode="'+(De(e.catLabelFormatCode)||"General")+'" sourceLinked="1"/>',e._type===ue.SCATTER?(n+='  <c:majorTickMark val="none"/>',n+='  <c:minorTickMark val="none"/>',n+='  <c:tickLblPos val="nextTo"/>'):(n+='  <c:majorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMajorTickMark||"out")+'"/>',n+='  <c:minorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMinorTickMark||"none")+'"/>',n+='  <c:tickLblPos val="'+(e.catAxisLabelPos||(e.barDir==="col"?"low":"nextTo"))+'"/>'),n+="  <c:spPr>",n+=`    <a:ln w="${e.catAxisLineSize?Ee(e.catAxisLineSize):Jo}" cap="flat">`,n+=e.catAxisLineShow?"<a:solidFill>"+Ge(e.catAxisLineColor||xa.color)+"</a:solidFill>":"<a:noFill/>",n+='      <a:prstDash val="'+(e.catAxisLineStyle||"solid")+'"/>',n+="      <a:round/>",n+="    </a:ln>",n+="  </c:spPr>",n+="  <c:txPr>",e.catAxisLabelRotate?n+=`<a:bodyPr rot="${Ca(e.catAxisLabelRotate)}"/>`:n+="<a:bodyPr/>",n+="    <a:lstStyle/>",n+="    <a:p>",n+="    <a:pPr>",n+=`      <a:defRPr sz="${Math.round((e.catAxisLabelFontSize||_r)*100)}" b="${e.catAxisLabelFontBold?1:0}" i="${e.catAxisLabelFontItalic?1:0}" u="none" strike="noStrike">`,n+="      <a:solidFill>"+Ge(e.catAxisLabelColor||or)+"</a:solidFill>",n+='      <a:latin typeface="'+(e.catAxisLabelFontFace||"Arial")+'"/>',n+="   </a:defRPr>",n+="  </a:pPr>",n+='  <a:endParaRPr lang="'+(e.lang||"en-US")+'"/>',n+="  </a:p>",n+=" </c:txPr>",n+=' <c:crossAx val="'+r+'"/>',n+=` <c:${typeof e.valAxisCrossesAt=="number"?"crossesAt":"crosses"} val="${e.valAxisCrossesAt||"autoZero"}"/>`,n+=' <c:auto val="1"/>',n+=' <c:lblAlgn val="ctr"/>',n+=` <c:noMultiLvlLbl val="${e.catAxisMultiLevelLabels?0:1}"/>`,e.catAxisLabelFrequency&&(n+=' <c:tickLblSkip val="'+e.catAxisLabelFrequency+'"/>'),(e.catLabelFormatCode||e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D)&&(e.catLabelFormatCode&&(["catAxisBaseTimeUnit","catAxisMajorTimeUnit","catAxisMinorTimeUnit"].forEach(a=>{e[a]&&(typeof e[a]!="string"||!["days","months","years"].includes(e[a].toLowerCase()))&&(console.warn(`"${a}" must be one of: 'days','months','years' !`),e[a]=null)}),e.catAxisBaseTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:baseTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisBaseTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>'),e.catAxisMajorTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:majorTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisMajorTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>'),e.catAxisMinorTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:minorTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisMinorTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>')),e.catAxisMajorUnit&&(n+=`<c:majorUnit val="${e.catAxisMajorUnit}"/>`),e.catAxisMinorUnit&&(n+=`<c:minorUnit val="${e.catAxisMinorUnit}"/>`)),e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D?n+="</c:valAx>":n+="</c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n}function Kc(e,t){let r=t===yn?e.barDir==="col"?"l":"b":e.barDir!=="col"?"r":"t";t===xs&&(r="r");const n=t===yn?ei:Uc;let a="";return a+="<c:valAx>",a+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',a+=" 		</Relationships>`}function v_(e,t,r){for(let n=0;n<t.length;n++)if(t[n]._name===e[r-1]._slideLayout._name)return n+1;return 1}function b_(e){var t,r,n,a;const o=!((t=e.theme)===null||t===void x(){typeof _=="function"&&(_(),_=void 0)}function C(){if(x(),n===void 0){b();return}if(s.value!=null&&c.value!=null){_=n(s.value,c.value,b);return}}function L(){a.value||(g.value=!1)}return x2(e){const t=Ls({nonce:ce()});return oe(()=>e?.value||t.nonce?.value)}function Nu(e,t="hex"){switch(t){case"hex":return _2(e);case"rgb":return C2(e);case"hsl":return k2(e);case"hsb":return E2(e);default:throw new Error(`Unknown format: ${t}`)}}function _2(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:En(e),r=n=>Math.round(n).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");if(t.alpha<1){const n=Math.round(t.alpha*255).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}${n}`}return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}`}function C2(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:En(e),{r,g:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`rgba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)}, ${o})`:`rgb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)})`}function k2(e){const t=e.space==="hsl"?e:ho(e),{h:r,s:n,l:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsla(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsl(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function E2(e){const t=e.space==="hsb"?e:$s(e),{h:r,s:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function En(e){if(e.space==="rgb")return e;if(e.space==="hsl")return T2(e);if(e.space==="hsb")return D2(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${e.space}`)}function ho(e){return e.space==="hsl"?e:S2(En(e))}function $s(e){return e.space==="hsb"?e:L2(En(e))}function S2(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function T2(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(c,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?c+(d-c)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?c+(d-c)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:c),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=l(s,u,t+1/3),o=l(s,u,t),i=l(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function L2(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function D2(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),c=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=c,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=c,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=c;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function di(e){switch(e){case"hue":return{min:0,max:360,step:1};case"saturation":case"lightness":case"brightness":case"alpha":return{min:0,max:100,step:1};case"red":case"green":case"blue":return{min:0,max:255,step:1};default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${e}`)}}function fi(e,t){switch(t){case"red":return e.space==="rgb"?e.r:En(e).r;case"green":return e.space==="rgb"?e.g:En(e).g;case"blue":return e.space==="rgb"?e.b:En(e).b;case"hue":return e.space==="hsl"?e.h:ho(e).h;case"saturation":return e.space==="hsl"||e.space==="hsb"?e.s:ho(e).s;case"lightness":return e.space==="hsl"?e.l:ho(e).l;case"brightness":return e.space==="hsb"?e.b:$s(e).b;case"alpha":return e.alpha*100;default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}}function Da(e,t,r){const n=di(t),a=Math.max(n.min,Math.min(n.max,r));if(t==="alpha")return{...e,alpha:a/100};if(t==="red"||t==="green"||t==="blue"){const i={...En(e),[t==="red"?"r":t==="green"?"g":"b"]:a};return P2(i,e.space)}if(t==="hue"||t==="lightness"){const i={...ho(e),[t==="hue"?"h":"l"]:a};return yg(i,e.space)}if(t==="saturation"){if(e.space==="hsb"){const u={...$s(e),s:a};return wg(u,e.space)}const i={...ho(e),s:a};return yg(i,e.space)}if(t==="brightness"){const i={...$s(e),b:a};return wg(i,e.space)}throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}function P2(e,t){if(t==="rgb")return e;if(t==="hsl")return xg(e);if(t==="hsb")return _g(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function yg(e,t){if(t==="hsl")return e;const r=N2(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsb")return _g(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function wg(e,t){if(t==="hsb")return e;const r=B2(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsl")return xg(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function xg(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function N2(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(c,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?c+(d-c)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?c+(d-c)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:c),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=l(s,u,t+1/3),o=l(s,u,t),i=l(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function _g(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function B2(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),c=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=c,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=c,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=c;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Hs(e){const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();if(t.startsWith("#"))return R2(t);if(t.startsWith("rgb"))return I2(t);if(t.startsWith("hsl"))return F2(t);if(t.startsWith("hsb")||t.startsWith("hsv"))return O2(t);throw new Error(`Unable to parse color: ${e}`)}function R2(e){let t=e.slice(1);if(!/^[0-9A-F]{3}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{8}$/i.test(t))throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}. Expected format: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA`);if(t.length===3&&(t=t.split("").map(r=>r+r).join("")),t.length===6){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>16&255,g:r>>8&255,b:r&255,alpha:1}}if(t.length===8){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>24&255,g:r>>16&255,b:r>>8&255,alpha:(r&255)/255}}throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}`)}function I2(e){const t=e.match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid RGB color: ${e}`);return{space:"rgb",r:parseFloat(t[1]),g:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function F2(e){const t=e.match(/hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSL color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsl",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),l:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function O2(e){const t=e.match(/hsb[av]?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSB color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsb",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function M2(e){return typeof e=="string"?Hs(e):e}function z2(e){try{return Hs(e),!0}catch{return!1}}const[U2,W2]=er("ColorFieldRoot");var q2=se({inheritAttrs:!1,__name:"ColorFieldRoot",props:{modelValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1},defaultValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1,default:"#000000"},colorSpace:{type:String,required:!1,default:"hsl"},channel:{type:String,required:!1},placeholder:{type:String,required:!1},disabled:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},readonly:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},disableWheelChange:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},locale:{type:String,required:!1},step:{type:Number,required:!1},asChild:{type:Boolean,required:!1},as:{type:null,required:!1,default:"div"},name:{type:String,required:!1},required:{type:Boolean,required:!1}},emits:["update:modelValue","update:color"],setup(e,{emit:t}){const r=e,n=t,{colorSpace:a,channel:o,disabled:i,readonly:l,disableWheelChange:u,placeholder:s,locale:c,step:d}=Lr(r),{forwardRef:p,currentElement:f}=Fe(),A=Lh(f);K1(c);const h=wa(r,"modelValue",n,{defaultValue:r.defaultValue,passive:r.modelValue===void 0}),g=oe({get:()=>M2(h.value??"#000000"),set:G=>{const $=Nu(G,"hex");h.value=$,n("update:color",G)}}),v=ce(""),_=ce(!1);rt(()=>g.value,G=>{_.value||(v.value=b(G))},{immediate:!0});function b(G){if(o.value){const $=fi(G,o.value);return o.value==="alpha",String(Math.round($))}return Nu(G,"hex")}const x=0,C=16777215,L=10;function D(){return d.value!=null?d.value:o.value?di(o.value).step:1}function B(G){v.value=G}function T(){if(_.value=!1,o.value){const G=parseFloat(v.value);if(!isNaN(G)){const $=di(o.value),X=Math.max($.min,Math.min($.max,G));g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,X)}v.value=b(g.value)}else{const G=v.value.trim();z2(G)&&(g.value=Hs(G)),v.value=b(g.value)}}function I(G){const $=Math.trunc(G),X=g.value.space==="rgb"?Math.round(g.value.r)<<16|Math.round(g.value.g)<<8|Math.round(g.value.b):(()=>{const he=En(g.value);return Math.round(he.r)<<16|Math.round(he.g)<<8|Math.round(he.b)})(),Y=`#${Math.min(Math.max(X+$,x),C).toString(16).padStart(6,"0")}`;g.value=Hs(Y),v.value=b(g.value)}function J(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const G=D();if(o.value){const $=fi(g.value,o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,$+G),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(G)}function S(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const G=D();if(o.value){const $=fi(g.value,o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,$-G),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(-G)}function W(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const G=D()*L;if(o.value){const $=fi(g.value,o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,$+G),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(G)}function y(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const G=D()*L;if(o.value){const $=fi(g.value,o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,$-G),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(-G)}function q(){if(!(i.value||l.value))if(o.value){const G=di(o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,G.max),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(C)}function ee(){if(!(i.value||l.value))if(o.value){const G=di(o.value);g.value=Da(g.value,o.value,G.min),v.value=b(g.value)}else I(-C)}function j(G){u.value||i.value||l.value||(G.preventDefault(),G.deltaY>0?S():J())}return
